conflicts.description: node-js: fails to build with gcc 4.8 (see https://github.com/spack/spack/issues/19310)
conflicts.name: %gcc@:4.8

conflicts.description: node-js: fails to build with gcc 14+ due to implicit conversions
conflicts.name: %gcc@14:

dependencies.description:
The NVIDIA HPC SDK is a comprehensive suite of compilers, libraries and
tools essential to maximizing developer productivity and the performance
and portability of HPC applications. The NVIDIA HPC SDK C, C++, and
Fortran compilers support GPU acceleration of HPC modeling and
simulation applications with standard C++ and Fortran, OpenACC
directives, and CUDA. GPU-accelerated math libraries maximize
performance on common HPC algorithms, and optimized communications
libraries enable standards-based multi-GPU and scalable systems
programming. Performance profiling and debugging tools simplify porting
and optimization of HPC applications.
dependencies.name: c

dependencies.description:
The NVIDIA HPC SDK is a comprehensive suite of compilers, libraries and
tools essential to maximizing developer productivity and the performance
and portability of HPC applications. The NVIDIA HPC SDK C, C++, and
Fortran compilers support GPU acceleration of HPC modeling and
simulation applications with standard C++ and Fortran, OpenACC
directives, and CUDA. GPU-accelerated math libraries maximize
performance on common HPC algorithms, and optimized communications
libraries enable standards-based multi-GPU and scalable systems
programming. Performance profiling and debugging tools simplify porting
and optimization of HPC applications.
dependencies.name: cxx

dependencies.description:
GNU Make is a tool which controls the generation of executables and
other non-source files of a program from the program's source files.
dependencies.name: gmake

dependencies.description:
ICU is a mature, widely used set of C/C++ and Java libraries providing
Unicode and Globalization support for software applications. ICU4C is
the C/C++ interface.
dependencies.name: icu4c

dependencies.description: libtool -- library building part of autotools.
dependencies.name: libtool

dependencies.description:
OpenSSL is an open source project that provides a robust, commercial-
grade, and full-featured toolkit for the Transport Layer Security (TLS)
and Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) protocols. It is also a general-purpose
cryptography library.
dependencies.name: openssl

dependencies.description:
pkgconf is a program which helps to configure compiler and linker flags
for development frameworks. It is similar to pkg-config from
freedesktop.org, providing additional functionality while also
maintaining compatibility.
dependencies.name: pkgconfig

dependencies.description: zlib replacement with optimizations for next generation systems.
dependencies.name: zlib-api

dependent_to.description:
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal,
understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing
routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows --
all through natural language commands.
dependent_to.name: claude-code

dependent_to.description:
MALT is a memory profile tool to track mallocs in a C/C++ application
and report allocation information (lifetime, sizes...) in a friendly web
graphical interface by annotating the source code and proving charts.
dependent_to.name: malt

dependent_to.description:
Minimap2 is a versatile sequence alignment program that aligns DNA or
mRNA sequences against a large reference database. Mappy provides a
convenient interface to minimap2.
dependent_to.name: minimap2

dependent_to.description: npm: A package manager for javascript.
dependent_to.name: npm

dependent_to.description: Prettier is an opinionated code formatter.
dependent_to.name: prettier

dependent_to.description:
Prometheus, a Cloud Native Computing Foundation project, is a systems
and service monitoring system.
dependent_to.name: prometheus

dependent_to.description:
CodeChecker is a static analysis infrastructure built on the LLVM/Clang
Static Analyzer toolchain, replacing scan-build in a Linux or macOS (OS
X) development environment.
dependent_to.name: py-codechecker

dependent_to.description:
A Python library designed to make data analysis and visualization
seamless and simple.
dependent_to.name: py-geoviews

dependent_to.description:
JupyterLab is the next-generation web-based user interface for Project
Jupyter.
dependent_to.name: py-jupyterlab

dependent_to.description: A high level app and dashboarding solution for Python.
dependent_to.name: py-panel

dependent_to.description:
An adaptation of the popular mkdocs-material theme for the Sphinx
documentation tool.
dependent_to.name: py-sphinx-immaterial

dependent_to.description: RStudio is an integrated development environment (IDE) for R.
dependent_to.name: rstudio

dependent_to.description:
Client and CLI for smee.io, a service that delivers webhooks to your
local development environment.
dependent_to.name: smee-client

dependent_to.description:
A modern and open IDE for cloud and desktop. The Theia IDE is based on
the Theia platform.
dependent_to.name: theia-ide

dependent_to.description:
Tree-sitter is a parser generator tool and an incremental parsing
library. It can build a concrete syntax tree for a source file and
efficiently update the syntax tree as the source file is edited.
dependent_to.name: tree-sitter

dependent_to.description:
TypeScript is a superset of JavaScript that compiles to clean JavaScript
output.
dependent_to.name: typescript

dependent_to.description: Fast, reliable, and secure dependency management.
dependent_to.name: yarn

description:
Node.js is an open-source, cross-platform JavaScript runtime
environment.
name: node-js
